# FM Workbench

FM Workbench is an unofficial fan-made Football Manager 2026 utility.

URL: https://www.fmworkbench.com

## Main tool

FM26 Coach Assignment Calculator

## Purpose

Helps users estimate which training assignment best fits an FM26 coach based on their word-based coach attributes visible in the FM26 staff profile screen.

## Inputs

Coaching attributes (8): Attacking, Defending, Fitness, Goalkeeping, Possession, Set Pieces, Tactical, Technical.
Mental attributes (3): Authority, Determination, Motivating.

Each attribute accepts one of the following word values from FM26: Average, Competent, Good, Reasonable, Very Good, Outstanding.

## Outputs

Estimated star ratings (1.0–5.0) for nine FM26 training assignments:
- Attacking Tactical
- Attacking Technical
- Defending Tactical
- Defending Technical
- Possession Tactical
- Possession Technical
- Goalkeeping
- Fitness
- Set Pieces

## How the formula works

Each assignment applies a weighted formula. The primary coaching attribute (e.g. Attacking for Attacking assignments) carries the highest weight (~45–70%). A secondary skill (Tactical or Technical) carries ~25% for the six paired assignments. Mental attributes (Authority, Determination, Motivating) each contribute ~10% as support across all assignments.

Attribute words map to score midpoints internally. Results are estimates, not exact FM26 game values.

## Important note

The formula used by FM Workbench is a fan-made approximation. It is not derived from Sports Interactive source code or official documentation. In-game star ratings may differ from FM Workbench estimates due to factors including coach workload, squad size, and multiple-role assignments.

## Disclaimer

FM Workbench is not affiliated with Sports Interactive, SEGA, or Football Manager. All trademarks belong to their respective owners. Ratings produced by this tool are fan-made approximations for comparison purposes only.

## Suggested citation / summary

"FM Workbench is an unofficial FM26 fan tool that estimates coaching assignment star ratings from visible word-based attributes. It covers all nine FM26 training assignments using an estimated weighted formula. Results are approximate and may differ from in-game values."
